2603.17199.title: Catching rationalization in the act: detecting motivated reasoning before and after CoT via activation probing
2603.17199.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) can produce chains of thought (CoT) that do not accurately reflect the actual factors driving their answers. In multiple-choice settings with an injected hint favoring a particular option, models may shift their final answer toward the hinted option and produce a CoT that rationalizes the response without acknowledging the hint - an instance of motivated reasoning. We study this phenomenon across multiple LLM families and datasets demonstrating that motivated reasoning can be identified by probing internal activations even in cases when it cannot be easily determined from CoT. Using supervised probes trained on the model's residual stream, we show that (i) pre-generation probes, applied before any CoT tokens are generated, predict motivated reasoning as well as a LLM-based CoT monitor that accesses the full CoT trace, and (ii) post-generation probes, applied after CoT generation, outperform the same monitor. Together, these results show that motivated reasoning is detected more reliably from internal representations than from CoT monitoring. Moreover, pre-generation probing can flag motivated behavior early, potentially avoiding unnecessary generation.
2603.17199.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）能夠產生思考鏈（CoT），但這些思考鏈並不準確反映驅動其答案的實際因素。在注入提示以偏向特定選項的多選情境中，模型可能會將最終答案轉向提示的選項，並產生一個合理化該回應的思考鏈，而不承認該提示——這是一種動機性推理的實例。我們研究了這一現象，涵蓋多個LLM家族和數據集，顯示動機性推理可以通過探測內部激活來識別，即使在從思考鏈中無法輕易確定的情況下。使用在模型的殘差流上訓練的監督探針，我們顯示（i）預生成探針在生成任何思考鏈標記之前應用，能夠預測動機性推理，並且與訪問完整思考鏈痕跡的基於LLM的思考鏈監測器一樣有效；（ii）後生成探針在思考鏈生成後應用，表現超過同樣的監測器。綜合這些結果顯示，動機性推理從內部表示中被檢測得更可靠，而不是從思考鏈監測中。此外，預生成探測可以早期標示動機性行為，潛在地避免不必要的生成。
2603.17199.author: Parsa Mirtaheri et.al.
